channel.title: TeslaBlog.eu — Tesla News & Updates
channel.description: Latest Tesla news, deals, and updates across Europe and beyond.

item.title: Bitcoin, ETH, XRP, DOGE, MSTR Cashtags Go Live on X Web, Musk Says Most Crypto Are Scams
item.description: Elon Musk’s X rolls out the Smart Cashtags feature for stocks and crypto assets on the web version today. This new feature adds interactive, real-time financial data to users’ timelines, supporting major crypto and stocks trading such as Bitcoin, ETH, XRP, SOL, DOGE, TSLA, MSTR, and COIN. Meanwhi...

item.title: Tesla Made $573 Million in Sales From SpaceX and xAI Last Year
item.description: (Bloomberg) -- Tesla Inc. generated more than half a billion dollars in revenue last year from selling products to two of Elon Musk’s other companies, the carmaker disclosed in an amended annual filing.Most Read from BloombergUS Seeks to Deploy Hypersonic Missile for the First Time Against IranTw...

item.title: Elon Musk reportedly labels most cryptocurrencies as 'scams'
item.description: Tesla (NASDAQ: TSLA) CEO Elon Musk has always been championed as being pro-crypto. But a recent reported comment in a court hearing is leaving the crowd puzzled. Musk, who co-founded OpenAI in 2015, is suing the company for allegedly breaching its founding mission of being non-profit after it ...

item.title: Tesla Stock Is Outrageously Cheap. Here's Why There Could Be Another 100% in Upside Potential.
item.description: One opportunity could add $1 trillion to Tesla's market cap.

item.title: Why Is Hertz Stock Up Today? A New Deal With Uber Focuses on Robo-Taxi Fleets.
item.description: Hertz shares are rising following the announcement that it will be part of the maintenance operations for Uber’s robo-taxi offerings.

item.title: Elon Musk Says Most Crypto Are Scams, But X Launches New Crypto Trading Terminal
item.description: Elon Musk called most crypto coins scams during OpenAI trial as X simultaneously launched its Cashtags trading feed.

item.title: Why Tesla Stock Is Climbing Today
item.description: Tesla Stock Rises. Progress on Semi Trucks Lifts Sentiment

item.title: Tesla Model X shocks everyone by crushing every other used car in America
item.description: The Tesla Model X was the fastest-selling used vehicle in the United States in the first quarter of the year, crushing every other used car in America. iSeeCars data for the first quarter shows that the Model X was the fastest-selling used car, lasting just 25.6 days on the market on average, two...

item.title: Tesla Begins Mass Producing Semi Trucks. Stock Rises.
item.description: Tesla's dedicated high-volume production line at its Sparks, Nev., facility successfully manufactured its first Semi trucks. Wednesday's announcement, made via an X post, caps a nearly decade-long wait for mass production of Tesla's commercial trucks, which were first shown the public in 2017.

item.title: The Dawn Project Report to Congress: Tesla's Self-Driving Software Has Been Involved in 59 Deaths, Urgent Regulatory Reform Needed
item.description: Public safety group delivers report documenting Tesla Full Self-Driving failures and calls for three specific regulatory reformsSANTA BARBARA, Calif., April 30, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- The Dawn Project today delivered a report to members of Congress and the National Highway Traffic Safety Admini...

item.title: How SoftBank Can Give Tesla Stock a Boost
item.description: Wednesday evening, the Financial Times reported that SoftBank was going to list an AI robotics company in the U.S., valued at up to $100 billion. The company, called Roze, likely includes assets, including ABB’s robotics division, that SoftBank agreed to buy in October for $5.4 billion. Inves...

item.title: Musk Says No Written Agreement for His Early Donation to OpenAI
item.description: (Bloomberg) -- Elon Musk acknowledged there was no written agreement or contract with OpenAI regarding the terms of his donation to the company when it was first founded as a nonprofit research organization more than a decade ago. Most Read from BloombergUS Seeks to Deploy Hypersonic Missile for ...

item.title: Tesla Hits a Milestone With Semi Truck Production. The Stock Is Up.
item.description: Tesla stock hasn’t gotten a boost from higher oil prices. The move came after Tesla reached a milestone: Its first semi truck rolled off the company’s high-volume production line on Wednesday. The total volume of semi trucks sold in the U.S and Europe each year is closer to 500,000.

item.title: Tesla Cybertruck’s head-scratching trim sold terribly, recall documents reveal
item.description: After Tesla decided to build a Rear-Wheel-Drive Cybertruck trim back in 2025, which was void of many features and only featured a small discount. The head-scratching offering was only available for a few months, and evidently, it did not sell very well, which we all suspected. New recall document...

item.title: Hyundai’s Pleos infotainment system is like Tesla’s, but with one big difference [Images]
item.description: The new Hyundai Pleos Connect is an easier-to-use, AI-based infotainment system that’s more like using a smartphone. It’s similar to Tesla’s, but with one key difference. more…

item.title: Tesla Semi sends clear message to Diesel rivals with latest move
item.description: Tesla has officially launched Semi production at what will be a mind-boggling rate of approximately 50,000 units per year. The truck is being built at a dedicated facility in Sparks, Nevada , just next to its Gigafactory Nevada facility. The company finally announced on April 29 that the first Te...

item.title: Hertz Stock Soars on Uber’s Robo-Taxi Push. This Is a Big Deal.
item.description: Hertz shares are rising following the announcement that it will be part of the maintenance operations for Uber’s robo-taxi offerings.

item.title: Forget Tesla’s Robotaxi Promises — BYD Already Has What Investors Really Want
item.description: Shares of Tesla (NASDAQ:TSLA) are once again dominating the financial press, with Elon Musk insisting that robotaxis, Optimus humanoids, and a coming wave of artificial intelligence will turn the company into something far bigger than a carmaker. But here is what you should actually be watching. ...

item.title: Tesla Begins Semi Truck Mass Production at Nevada Plant
item.description: First units roll off line as deliveries expected later this year.

item.title: Tesla finally gets Semi production moving at scale
item.description: Long-delayed EV truck finally enters high-volume phase

item.title: Elon Musk to return to witness stand for cross-examination by OpenAI's lawyer
item.description: Elon Musk is due to return to the witness stand on Thursday for a second day of ‌cross-examination by Sam Altman's lawyer, in a high-stakes trial over a lawsuit Musk brought ‌accusing OpenAI of abandoning its mission to develop artificial intelligence for the benefit of humanity. The world's rich...

item.title: Tesla, Inc. (TSLA) Capex to Exceed $25B in 2026, Says Morgan Stanley
item.description: We recently compiled a list of the 10 Most Popular Stocks on Robinhood in 2026. Tesla, Inc. is one of the most popular stocks on Robinhood.

item.title: Tesla ‘Robotaxi’ unsupervised fleet finally shows some signs of ramping up
item.description: Tesla’s “unsupervised” Robotaxi fleet has grown to 25 cumulative vehicles across three Texas cities, according to new data from the Robotaxi Tracker. It’s still an extremely number far below what CEO Elon Musk predicted, but it marks the first real signs of growth nearly a year into the program. ...

item.title: The Tesla Semi Is Finally Going Into Mass Production
item.description: Unveiled in 2017, the Class 8 electric big rig took its sweet time to get to this point.

item.title: Is Tesla a Buy, Sell, or Hold in 2026?
item.description: Long-term investors' patience is being tested by the latest developmets, or lack of, at Tesla.

item.title: Where Will Tesla Be in 10 Years?
item.description: Tesla faces a future that presents anything but a certain outcome.

item.title: Musk Put on Defensive Over His Financial Commitment to OpenAI
item.description: (Bloomberg) -- Elon Musk became visibly irritated on the witness stand Wednesday as an attorney for OpenAI questioned whether the billionaire backed off his financial commitment to the startup in its early years.Most Read from BloombergNorth Korea Confirms Suicide Rule for Soldiers Ukraine Captur...

item.title: The Chinese battery giant powering Tesla just raised $5 billion
item.description: Most Americans cannot tell you who built the battery in their electric vehicle. They know the badge on the hood, the lease payment, and the range estimate. The cell underneath, the single most expensive part of the car, is anonymous to them.

item.title: 2027 Chevy Blazer EV drops CCS for Tesla-style NACS port
item.description: GM is continuing its shift to Tesla’s NACS charging standard, and the 2027 Chevy Blazer EV is next in line. more…

item.title: ‘Your questions are designed to trick me’: combative Musk grilled over battle with Sam Altman
item.description: Lawyers for world’s richest person try to paint him as humanitarian as judge cuts off his long-winded replies

item.title: Top Stock Reports for Tesla, ConocoPhillips & Parker-Hannifin
item.description: Tesla faces rising capex and delayed robotaxi rollout even as energy, charging growth expand, while ConocoPhillips and Parker-Hannifin show strength.

item.title: Elon Musk says Sam Altman tried to 'steal' charity, as moguls contest $150bn court battle
item.description: Elon Musk has accused his rival Sam Altman of trying to "steal" a charity as he fights his $150bn (£111bn) court claim over OpenAI. The trial centres on the 2015 birth of OpenAI, maker of ChatGPT, as a non-profit start-up, primarily funded by Mr Musk, before it evolved into a capitalist venture n...

item.title: Tesla Semi: first truck rolls off high-volume production line
item.description: Tesla has produced the first Semi truck off its new high-volume production line at Gigafactory Nevada, marking a critical milestone for the long-delayed electric truck program. The automaker shared an image of the truck on its official Tesla Semi account on X, confirming volume production is now ...

item.title: Rocsys unveils hands-free charging system for robotaxis, raises $13M
item.description: Rocsys launched the M1, which it calls the world’s first hands-free charging system capable of serving multiple bays in robotaxi depot operations. A single overhead-mounted unit can charge vehicles across up to 10 bays without human intervention. The Dutch-American company also announced a $13 mi...

item.title: Market Chatter: SpaceX's Starlink Revenue Per User Falls as Customers Quadrupled
item.description: Tesla (TSLA) Chief Executive Elon Musk's SpaceX Starlink internet service saw revenue per user falli

item.title: Opinion: Tesla Is the Priciest Bargain Stock on the Market
item.description: Tesla (NASDAQ:TSLA) looks expensive on every traditional metric and cheap on every forward one. That tension has helped define the stock’s bull case in 2026, which has seen shares of TSLA fall by more than 15%. The Premium That Scares Value Investors Tesla trades at a trailing P/E of 345, a forwa...

item.title: Tesla Semi hits the port: drayage operator MDB launches 3-week freight pilot
item.description: MDB Transportation, a Southern California drayage operator, has launched a three-week pilot running a Tesla Semi on active port freight lanes — marking the second port trucking company to put the electric Class 8 truck to work hauling containers. The Compton-based carrier is testing the Semi in o...

item.title: Musk Testifies Against OpenAI Shift As Trial Could Shape Future IPO
item.description: Musk challenges OpenAI's for-profit transition as court weighs precedent and governance ahead of potential large-scale public offering.

item.title: Tesla Eyes Model Y L U.S. Launch as Stock Slips
item.description: Potential product expansion and AI upgrades fail to lift shares

item.title: Tesla gives HW3 owners another massive update
item.description: Tesla is giving Hardware 3 vehicle owners another massive update, the second major communication the company has given to those drivers after what seemed like years of being left out to dry. The company, which plans to launch a Full Self-Driving version 14 iteration that is compatible with these ...

item.title: MDB Pilots Tesla Semi in Port Drayage Operations
item.description: California drayage operator deploys Class 8 electric truck on live port freight lanes in a three-week pilot, advancing zero-emission goals for last-mile container moves. COMPTON, CA / ACCESS Newswire / April 29, 2026 / MDB, a Southern California drayage ...

item.title: Tesla: The Future Is Promising, The Valuation Assumes It's Here
Tesla Stock Falls. Elon Musk Talks Up ‘Special’ Optimus 3 Robot.
item.description: Investors want to see the latest version of Tesla’s humanoid robot, Optimus. Musk believes robots will be the biggest product in human history.

item.title: GM unveils plan to take on key Tesla tech
item.description: General Motors had a pretty good quarter if you don't compare it to last year, but the company is looking ahead and expects to shake up the autonomous driving industry by 2028. GM reported its first-quarter earnings results before the opening bell on Tuesday, April 28. Earnings were down, revenue...

item.title: Which Matters Most for Tesla Stock: The Cybercab, the Semi, or Megapack 3?
item.description: Elon Musk says that all three are still expected to enter volume production this year.

item.title: Xpeng VLA 2.0 test drive: Tesla is not alone with ‘Full Self-Driving’ anymore
item.description: I test-drove Xpeng’s new VLA 2.0 autonomous driving system in Beijing last week, and after 40 minutes of navigating one of the most aggressive driving environments in the world, I didn’t have to intervene once. This is a major development. Tesla has been the clear leader in advanced driver-assist...

item.title: 4 Reasons Why SpaceX’s First Trading Day Might Be Hard to Sit Out
item.description: The big SpaceX mega IPO is getting closer, and with a $1.75 trillion expected valuation (plus or minus a couple hundred billion or so), there’s sure to be a flood of investors who will need to sell something in order to load up on opening day. Undoubtedly, some of the hardcore Elon Musk fans migh...

item.title: Tesla's Optimus will be 'its biggest product ever'
item.description: Laffer Tengler Investments CEO and CIO Nancy Tengler sits down with Brooke DiPalma to expand upon her outlook on Tesla (TSLA), especially as the EV company expands its vision further into autonomous driving and robotics.

item.title: Tesla Plans International Expansion of FSD Software Rollout
item.description: Tesla (NASDAQ:TSLA) announced on Tuesday that it intends to extend availability of its Full Self-Driving (FSD) software to more international markets, following the expected U. S.

item.title: SpaceX IPO: Potentially Millions of Retail Investors Will Make This Costly Mistake -- Don't Be One of Them
item.description: The buzz around Wall Street's largest-ever initial public offering (IPO) may entice everyday investors into a poor decision.
